protocol.name: brcm_gfx_buffer
protocol.copyright: Copyright (C) 2022 Broadcom. The term "Broadcom" refers to Broadcom Limited and/or its subsidiaries.

enum.name: flags

description.summary: A bit mask of buffer flags.

enum.description: The combination of flags describe various buffer attributes.

request.name: buffer_create

description.summary: Create a wl_buffer from given gfx buffer

request.description: A wl_buffer object contains one of the swapchain buffers.
